## Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.DomainServices Namespace

| :--- | :--- |
| [DaprDomainServiceInvoker](Hexalith.EventStore.Server.DomainServices.DaprDomainServiceInvoker.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.DomainServices\.DaprDomainServiceInvoker') | DAPR\-based domain service invoker\. Uses DaprClient\.InvokeMethodAsync for service invocation \(D7\)\. Created per\-actor\-call \(same pattern as IdempotencyChecker, TenantValidator, EventStreamReader\)\. No custom retry logic — DAPR resiliency handles transient failures \(enforcement rule \#4\)\. |
| [DomainServiceException](Hexalith.EventStore.Server.DomainServices.DomainServiceException.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.DomainServices\.DomainServiceException') | Exception thrown when a domain service response violates configured limits \(AC \#6\)\. Examples: too many events, event payload too large\. |
| [DomainServiceNotFoundException](Hexalith.EventStore.Server.DomainServices.DomainServiceNotFoundException.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.DomainServices\.DomainServiceNotFoundException') | Exception thrown when no domain service is registered for a given tenant and domain\. Includes the expected config store key pattern for operator guidance\. |
| [DomainServiceOptions](Hexalith.EventStore.Server.DomainServices.DomainServiceOptions.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.DomainServices\.DomainServiceOptions') | Configuration options for domain service resolution and invocation\. |
| [DomainServiceRegistration](Hexalith.EventStore.Server.DomainServices.DomainServiceRegistration.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.DomainServices\.DomainServiceRegistration') | Registration data for a domain service resolved from the DAPR config store\. Maps a tenant\+domain combination to a DAPR app\-id and method name\. |
| [DomainServiceResolver](Hexalith.EventStore.Server.DomainServices.DomainServiceResolver.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.DomainServices\.DomainServiceResolver') | Resolves domain service registrations from the DAPR config store\. Encapsulates config store lookup logic \(AC \#1, \#7\)\. |

| :--- | :--- |
| [IDomainServiceInvoker](Hexalith.EventStore.Server.DomainServices.IDomainServiceInvoker.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.DomainServices\.IDomainServiceInvoker') | Minimal contract for invoking a domain service to process a command\. The server calls domain services via DAPR; in tests, this is faked\. |
| [IDomainServiceResolver](Hexalith.EventStore.Server.DomainServices.IDomainServiceResolver.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.DomainServices\.IDomainServiceResolver') | Resolves domain service registrations from the DAPR config store for a given tenant and domain\. |
